ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the geographical location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of data collection (1-12) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature recorded (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation recorded (in millimeters) */,
  "ghg_emissions" REAL /* Total greenhouse gas emissions recorded (in metric tons) */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., verified, preliminary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographical_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "geo_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the geographical location belongs */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate category (e.g., Temperature, Precipitation) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., GHG Emissions) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the metric belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_metrics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES climate_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data entry that the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the file */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data entry that the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the readme file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the file */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
